Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPORG1 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform Organization READ;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; DIQ 10090 ; DVPXUTL ; RDORG(SOURCE,TARGET) ; N ARRAY,DVPORG N X F X="organizationId" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) ; I $G(ORGANIZA)="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Organization Identifier is required.","RDORG^DVPORG1") ; I '$$SITECHK^DVPXUTL(ORGANIZA,"RDORG^DVPORG1") G QUIT I +$P(ORGANIZA,":",5)=0 D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","code-invalid","MSG_ID_INVALID","The supplied organizationId: "_ORGANIZA_" has an invalid format.","RDORG^DVPORG1") ; I $P($G(ORGANIZA),":",5)="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Organization Identifier: "_ORGANIZA_" does not have the correct format.","RDORG^DVPORG1") ; S IEN=$P($G(ORGANIZA),":",5) D GETS^DIQ(4,IEN_",","**","","ARRAY") I $D(ARRAY)'=10 D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","not-found","MSG_NO_EXIST","No Organization record found for organizationId: "_ORGANIZA_".","RDORG^DVPORG1") ; D FHIRORG(ORGANIZA,.DVPORG,0) M @TARGET@("results","resource")=DVPORG QUIT ; Q ; FHIRORG(ORGANIZA,TARGET,SMRY) ; N FMIEN S FMIEN=$P(ORGANIZA,":",5)_"," K ARRAY D GETS^DIQ(4,FMIEN_",","**","","ARRAY") ; identifier S TARGET("id")=ORGANIZA N IX,CNT S CNT=0,IX="" F S IX=$O(ARRAY(4.9999,IX)) Q:IX="" D . S CNT=CNT+1 . S TARGET("identifier",CNT,"use")="official" . S TARGET("identifier",CNT,"system")=$G(ARRAY(4.9999,IX,.01)) . S TARGET("identifier",CNT,"value")=$G(ARRAY(4.9999,IX,.02)) . I $G(ARRAY(4.9999,IX,.03))'="" S TARGET("identifier",CNT,"start")=$G(ARRAY(4.9999,IX,.03)) S CNT=CNT+1 S TARGET("identifier",CNT,"use")="usual" S TARGET("identifier",CNT,"system")="http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien" S TARGET("identifier",CNT,"value")=ORGANIZA ; active S TARGET("active")=$S($G(ARRAY(4,FMIEN,101))=1:"false",1:"true") ; name S TARGET("name")=$G(ARRAY(4,FMIEN,.01)) ; physical address I SMRY G QUIT2 S $P(ADDRTYP,U,2)="physical" S $P(ADDRTYP,U,3)=$G(ARRAY(4,FMIEN,1.01)) S $P(ADDRTYP,U,4)=$G(ARRAY(4,FMIEN,1.02)) S $P(ADDRTYP,U,5)="" S $P(ADDRTYP,U,6)=$G(ARRAY(4,FMIEN,1.03)) S $P(ADDRTYP,U,7)=$G(ARRAY(4,FMIEN,.03)) S $P(ADDRTYP,U,8)=$G(ARRAY(4,FMIEN,.02)) S $P(ADDRTYP,U,9)=$G(ARRAY(4,FMIEN,1.04)) S $P(ADDRTYP,U,10)=$G(ARRAY(4,FMIEN,801)) N ADDR D ADDRESS^DVPXUTL(.ADDR,ADDRTYP) M TARGET("address",1)=ADDR ; postal address S ADDRTYP="",$P(ADDRTYP,U,2)="postal" S $P(ADDRTYP,U,3)=$G(ARRAY(4,FMIEN,4.01)) S $P(ADDRTYP,U,4)=$G(ARRAY(4,FMIEN,4.02)) S $P(ADDRTYP,U,5)="" S $P(ADDRTYP,U,6)=$G(ARRAY(4,FMIEN,4.03)) S $P(ADDRTYP,U,7)=$G(ARRAY(4,FMIEN,.03)) S $P(ADDRTYP,U,8)=$G(ARRAY(4,FMIEN,4.04)) S $P(ADDRTYP,U,9)=$G(ARRAY(4,FMIEN,4.05)) S $P(ADDRTYP,U,10)=$G(ARRAY(4,FMIEN,801)) K ADDR D ADDRESS^DVPXUTL(.ADDR,ADDRTYP) M TARGET("address",2)=ADDR ; contact N IX,CNT S CNT=0,IX="" F S IX=$O(ARRAY(4.03,IX)) Q:IX="" D . S CNT=CNT+1 . S TARGET("contact",CNT,"name","text")=$G(ARRAY(4.03,IX,.01)) . I $G(ARRAY(4.03,IX,.03))'="" D . . S TARGET("contact",CNT,"telecom",1,"system")="phone" . . S TARGET("contact",CNT,"telecom",1,"value")=$G(ARRAY(4.03,IX,.03)) ; QUIT2 ; Q
